PathOfBuilding2.Notes:
Major Credit to ^xAF6025Lundburgerr^7 at ^xD02090twitch.tv/lundburgerr^7 lots of tech and the later build comes from him. You can find his end game build guide here: ^xD02090maxroll.gg/poe2/pob/du6bl0zq^7
Made by ^xAF6025Angormus^7 at ^xD02090twitch.tv/angormus^7
This guide is only meant to guide to towards an A6 League Start %
^xADAA47Relevant for PoE2 Patch 0.1, 0.2 depends on the patch notes^7.
^xD02090Priority of Early Supports^7:
Conc Effect -> Impact Shockwaves -> Martial Tempo -> Magnified Effect -> Window of Opportunity -> Overpower -> Unbreakable
^xD02090Skills^7: ^x8888FF Mace Strike ^7with ^x8888FFConc Effect / Martial Tempo^7, stops being useful outside of small hits to finish off a rare after level 14. Can slot in ^x8888FFCulling Strike^7 later. ^x8888FFRolling Slam^7^7 with ^x8888FFConc Effect / Overpower^7 (to deal more stun buildup when needed) and ^x8888FFMartial Tempo / Unbreakable^7 for better clear. This is to prime ^x8888FFBoneshatter^7 procs. ^x8888FFBoneshatter^7 with ^x8888FFImpact Shockwaves^7 & ^x8888FFMagnified Effect^7, next link will be ^x8888FFArmor Explosion^7 after you've specced ^xE05030Shattering Blows^7, can use ^x8888FFFire Infusion^7 with early 2nd 4 link. ^x8888FFShield Charge^7 for movement, can slot in ^x8888FFFire Infusion / Stomping Grounds^7 for decent damage, but only impactful early with extra support gem drops. ^x8888FFInfernal Cry^7 with ^x8888FFPremeditation^7 & ^x8888FFRaging Cr^7y. ^x8888FFHerald of Ash^7 with ^x8888FFCannibalism^7 when possible, ^x8888FFCannibalism^7 is very good for sustain. ^x8888FFHerbalism^7 is also a good support. ^x8888FFPerfect Strike^7 with ^x8888FFWindow of Opportunity^7 & ^x8888FFConc Effect / Martial Tempo^7. Use ^x8888FFMartial Tempo^7 on bosses with small hitboxes or that move around a lot. Can use ^x8888FFFire Infusion / Primal Armament^7 on bosses where you don't need ^x8888FFMartial Tempo^7 once it's 4 linked. ^x8888FFScavenged Plating^7 with ^x8888FFPersistence ^7^7after you've specced ^xB97123^xE05030Shattering Blows^7^7, throw Cannibalism over here if you want to use it before ^x70FF70Azak Bog^7 A3 Cruel spirit quest reward. ^x8888FFLeap Slam^7 with ^x8888FFMartial Tempo^7 & ^x8888FFUnbreakable / Overpower^7 used for movement and to prime ^x8888FFBoneshatter^7 procs. Later you can link it with ^x8888FFHoly Descent^7 and ^x8888FFMaim^7. ^x8888FFHammer of the Gods^7 with ^x8888FFFist of War^7, ^x8888FFEternal Flame^7, & ^x8888FFSearing Flame^7.
You'll want a ^x8888FFFlammability^7 Setup in your second weapon swap with a ^x8888FFHammer of the Gods^7 spec (can use the same weapon/shield in Patch 0.2 for both). Link ^x8888FFHeighted Curse, Arcane Tempo, ^7and^7 ^x8888FFFocused Curse^7^7 to ^x8888FFFlammability^7. ^x8888FFOverwhelming Presence^7 can also be good later.
^xD02090Act 1^7:
^xADAA47Regex^7: "speed|o stre|s: tw|ed bl|ed.+rec"
^x70FF70Riverbank^7: Get 1 hander & shield to second weapon swap without holding shield. Position yourself in the "nook" after 1st stun on ^xAF6025Miller^7.
^x70FF701st Town^7: Level up after clicking Renly, grab skill gem, and open shop without clicking out or Renly does his slow walk. ^x70FF70Shop priority^7: 2Hander, dual 1Hander, and skill ^x8888FFFrost^7 ^x8888FFBomb^7 if neither. Skill ^x8888FFBoneshatter^7 if 2 or 1 hander. Check for MS boots, you'll stay level 2 if there's some, or hit level 3 by ^xAF6025Devourer^7 kill if none.
^x70FF70Clearfell^7: If forced into ^x8888FFFrost Bomb^7, grab level 1 skill gem from chest for ^x8888FFBoneshatter^7. Grab ^x70FF70Mud Burrow^7 CP and fight ^xAF6025Beira^7 for ^xB97123+10% cold res^7, ideally drag in as many wolves as possible to ^x8888FFBoneshatter^7 against her. Grab ^x70FF70Grelwood^7 CP & enter ^x70FF70Mud Burrow^7.
^x70FF70Mud Burrow^7: CP nearish to start has a resettable blue pack, hatchery has lots of white items / wisdoms if lucky. Skill gem level 2 = ^x8888FFBoneshatter^7. ^x70FF702nd Town^7: Support Gem from Renly fo^x8888FF^xC8C8C8r ^x8888FFConc Effect^7^7 in ^x8888FFMace Strike^7. ^x70FF70Shop Priority^7: 2 Hander if none, MS boots, +str on anything to use ^x8888FFShield Charg^7^x8888FFe^7 at level 6, and then +dmg/IAS on gloves.
^x70FF70Grelwood^7: Leave town through ^x70FF70Clearfell^7, CP over to ^x70FF70Grelwood^7 entrance. Search for Witch's Hut. Grab medium life/mana flasks and kill her for support gem. Can drag mobs over to her to ^x8888FFBoneshatter^7. Support gem = ^x8888FFImpact Shockwaves^7 on ^x8888FFBoneshatter^7. Head NE from Witch's hut first to avoid the giga deadend WP bot right layout. Thinking with CPs, grab ^x70FF70Grim Tangle^7 & ^x70FF70Grelwood^7 WPs before entering ^x70FF70The Red Vale^7.
^x70FF70The Red Vale^7: Ideal level on enter is 4 with full medium flasks. 8 layout tells, 16 layouts, can know which one from entrance tile. Collecting big packs + open Refined/Rusted arms for chances at an Oak Greathammer. ^xFFFF77White Felled Greatclub^7 = Need ^x8888FFConc^7 ^x8888FFEffect^7 in^x8888FF Rolling Slam^7 to prime^x8888FF Boneshatter^7. ^xFFFF77White Oak Hammer^7 =^x8888FF Rolling Slam^7 no supports. Hit level 5-5.5 by ^xAF6025Rust King^7 kill. Drag over mobs to start off with a big ^x8888FFBoneshatter^7, same with his add phase. Level 3 skill gem = ^x8888FFShield Charge^7
^x70FF703rd/4th Town^7: Grab Spikes from Renly. WP to ^x70FF70Grelwood^7, dodge roll after each spike placement, and portal out. Must talk to Una in town, buy ^xFFFF77wisdoms^7. ^x70FF70Shop Priority^7: Great Oak Hammer with + dmg, ms boots, +str on anything, +dmg/ias on gloves. Dex on gear can be really good to keep chance to hit at 100% pre-^xE05030RT^7.
^x70FF70Grim Tangle^7: Click Una after summoning her and reset at checkpoint to skip her song. Solutions based off entrance direction, side of the WP, & early zone tells. Path to Druid, support gem = ^x8888FFMartial Tempo^7, keep in ^x8888FFRolling Slam^7 for clear, and^x8888FF Mace Strike^7 for single target. Hit level 6-6.5 by ^x70FF70Cemetery^7 enter.
^xD02090Shield Charging^7: There is landing lag at the end of each ^x8888FFShield Charge^7, and when you hit monsters. You want to dodge roll or tap ^x8888FFRaise Shield^7 at the end of each use, or dodge roll right before you would hit a monster to get past.
^xADAA47You want to get a slim mace (best APS base 1 hander mace) for your shield charge / leap slam setup.^7
^x70FF70Cemetery^7: Enter Draven's area first, exit, then enter Consort's area for level 9 zone. Create new instance when entering Draven's area to also get a level 9 zone, previously entered instance will only be level 8. This gives you two chances for level 11 loot/weapons (^xFFFF77Forge Maul^7). Enter first secondary zone after hitting level 7. Search for ring along wall meanwhile. Support Gem in Consort area = ^x8888FFPremeditation^7 on ^x8888FFInfernal Cry^7
^x70FF705th Tow^7^x70FF70n^7 ^x70FF70& Lachlann^7: TP out of 2nd fight -> WP to Cemetery to be at Lachlann after vendoring. ^x70FF70Shop Priority^7^7: Great Oak Hammer with + dmg or ms boots if none still. Hit level 8-9 before ^xAF6025Lachlann^7 fight. Do not pick up the Count's Ring. Level 3 skill gem = ^x8888FFInfernal Cry^7, extra skill gem drops are ^x8888FFBoneshatter^7 then ^x8888FFRolling Slam^7.
^x70FF70Hunting Grounds^7: Hit all checkpoints, save ^xAF6025Crowbell^7 for later (level 11 with Forge Maul or post-Una's Lute). Support = ^x8888FFMagnified Effect^7 (+5 int on first stat node) in ^x8888FFBoneshatter^7.
^x70FF70Farmlands^7 ^x70FF701.0^7: Lute rush -> TP back, want to be level 10 here. Fish for ^xB97123^xFFFF77Greater Life Flask^7^7.
^x70FF70Freythorn^7: Fish for ^xFFFF77Forge Maul / Greater Life Flask^7 at 11/12. When you find the boss ritual, dark swirls indicate the direction of the rituals. Take ^x8888FFHerald of Ash^7.
^x70FF70Farmlands 2.0^7: WP in, CP to Una's Hut. Crop circle if found = level 4 skill gem for ^x8888FFRolling Slam^7.
^x70FF70Village^7: Path to the ^xAF6025Executioner^7 indicates where the Smithing Tools are. Chest in Smithy contains a damage rune. Talk to Leitus after ^xAF6025Executioner^7 fight for level 5 skill gem in town = ^x8888FFPerfect Strike^7. Support Gem = ^x8888FFOverpower^7 in ^x8888FFRolling Sla^7^x8888FFm^7, might not use right away.
^x70FF70Ramparts^7: Hanged Man Support Gem = Window of Opportunity in Perfect Strike Want to be level 13 before ^x70FF70Manor^7 enter.
^x70FF70Manor^7: Find ^xAF6025Candlemass^7 WP on 1st floor. Then head towards ^xAF6025Count^7, enter boss arena at level 14. Get a free ^x8888FFPerfect Strike^7 off on both phases. TP out after ^xAF6025Count^7 fight, WP to ^x70FF70Manor^7, CP to ^xAF6025Candlemass^7, get free ^x8888FFPerfect Strike^7 off, CP back to ^xAF6025Count^7 for loot + use same portal out. This skips waiting for the 45 second ^xAF6025Count^7 post-death YAP, done fast you're back as the loot drops.
^xD02090Act 2^7: More flexibility for returning to town to insure a minimum amount of damage on weapon / resistance gear. 20%+ fire/lightning is good enough, 40%+ either is amazing. Cold res is not a priority at all.
^xADAA47Regex^7: "(fi|li).+res|speed|s: tw|ed bl|um li|ed.+rec"
^x70FF70Outskirts^7: Good zone for exping, hug a wall till ^xAF6025Rathbreaker^7 alley. Be level 15-16. ^x70FF701st Town^7: Check for good ^xFFFF77Studded Greatclub^7, 40% idp is plenty good. A good ^xFFFF77Forge Maul^7 is also plenty for now.
^x70FF70Halani Gates 1.0^7: Can go back as soon as quest state pops up on screen, don't need to talk to Asala. Portal out
^x70FF70Mawdun Quarry^7: Group together big packs of mobs in 2 open areas. Cross bridges at CPs. Be level 16-17.
^x70FF70Mawdun Mines^7: Boss arena always at the Northmost point in the zone. Good time to fish for Studded Greatclub There is a resettable champ pack, but it's not consistently good, depends on instance. Bad packs are 2-3 blue monsters, and good packs are always 5+ blue monsters.
^x70FF70Traitor's Passage 1.0^7: Unless you get an early Six Sisters layout, ^xAF6025Balbala^7 and ^x70FF70Halani Gates^7 entrance will be after the Six Sisters CP. Notes on the wall indicates which way ^xAF6025Balbala^7 is, go to fight ^xAF6025Jamanra^7 first, then you'll return to fight ^xAF6025Balbala^7. Good zone for exp. Notes on the wall
^x70FF70Halani Gates 2.0^7: Need to clear all monsters near each gate mechanism for Asala to turn it. Can leave her as soon as the 1st door opens if you reset at CP near the ^xB97123Forward Command Camp^7 to get her back next to you. Kill rare for a 100% chance drop of a rare weapon. After 2nd bridge, there's a CP and a pack of statues that gives 9%-10% exp at level 18/19. Reset in mass here to hit level 20 if not caught up. ^xAF6025Jamanra^7 drops no loot. CP to WP's CP, enter ^x70FF70Traitor's Passage^7 again.
^x70FF70Traitor's Passage 2.0^7: CP to Six Sisters CP, go down area with notes on the wall to search for ^xAF6025Balbala^7. Important to fight her at level 20 because she is evasive, and you allocate Resolute Technique at level 20.
^xD02090Zone Levels in Act 2^7: Similar to the cemetery zone trick to do both at level 9, you can use a similar trick to fight act 2 bosses at a lower level. The goal is to fight the duo boss in ^x70FF70The Bone Pits^7 at level 24, ^xAF6025Zalmarath, The Colossus^7 at level 25, and^xAF6025 Azarian^7 at level 27. ^xD02090 Optimal Pathing^7: ^x70FF70Keth^7 -> ^x70FF70The Lost City^7 -> ^x70FF70Buried Shrines^7 WP Grab +2 points from ^xAF6025Kabala^7 in ^x70FF70Keth^7 ^x70FF70Mastodon Badlands^7 -> ^x70FF70The Bone Pits^7 WP, you will be returning to this instance after grabbing the second titan zone WP. ^x70FF70Valley of the Titans^7 -> ^x70FF70The Titan Grotto^7 WP, you will be returning to this instance after the duo bonezone bosses. ^x70FF70The Bone Pits ^xC8C8C8^7boss fight^7^7^7 -> ^x70FF70The Titan Grotto^7 boss fight ->^x70FF70 Buried Shrines^7, hugging North wall for free resistance ring, and boss fight. ^xAF6025 Azarian^7 does not fight back for a while, be sure to not damage him with anything, but a ^x8888FFPerfect Strike^7 for first tick of damage against him.
Relics drop from hyenas in the bone zones, and snakes in the Keth line, turn them in at the WP in ^x70FF70Valley of the Titans^7. If they don't drop on the way, might need to reset at CP to farm a couple mobs.
^xD02090Level Targets^7: 22 by ^x70FF70Buried Shrines^7 WP, 23 by ^x70FF70The Titan Grotto^7 WP. Skip killing after level 23 outside of relic farming.
^xD02090Skill Gems^7: Level ^x8888FFPerfect Strike^7 first, ^x8888FFBoneshatter^7 gets next levels if more skill gems drop. Support gems, get Unbreakable, first for ^x8888FFRolling Slam^7, and then ^x8888FFLeap Slam^7 when ^x8888FFOverpower^7 isn't needed to prime ^x8888FFBoneshatter^7 procs. 1st Level 7 skill gem = ^x8888FFLeap Slam^7, socket in ^x8888FFMartial Tempo^7 and ^x8888FFUnbreakable^7 / ^x8888FFOverpower^7 when needed. Keep ^x8888FFLeap Slam^7 at level 7 If you need to level ^x8888FFLeap Slam^7 up for increased stun buildup, hold onto the level 7 version, you will need it later.
^xD02090Leap Slamming^7:^x8888FF Leap Slam^7 in weapon swap 1 is used with your 2 hander to prime ^x8888FFBoneshatter^7. Manually swap between 2 hander setup to prime Boneshatter and 1 hander setup to leap through zones. Tap ^x8888FFRaise Shield^7 at the end of leap slam to cancel the landing lag. Until you can handle ^xE05030Giant's Blood^7 to leap slam 2 hander with a shield, you must roll out of every leap slam to deal with the landing lag.
^xADAA47Best APS 1 hander is the Slim Mace base.^7
^xD02090Horn Crafted^7: Travel to ^x70FF70Halani Gates^7 with the caravan to blow the horn, unlocks ^x70FF70Deshar^7 on the map.
^x70FF70Deshar^7: ^xB97123The Final Letter^7 (corpse for +2 skill points) will spawn on the south side of any building. Exit has unique lanterns next to it along far wall. Good zone for exp, be level 24-25 on zone exit.
^x70FF70Path of the Mourning^7: Bad zone for exp, leap through, kill big packs as they come through.
^x70FF70Spires of Deshar^7: Good zone for exp, look for ^xB97123+^xB9712310% lightning res^7 onroute to boss, can search other side of zone after grabbing boss CP.
^x70FF70Dreadnought^7: Zoom through towards final CP near the double blue pack. Which packs can spawn are based upon instance. Worst packs are casters with small bugs, and big bugs. The best instances give juicy Faridun & crawler packs all the time. Farm to 31/32 here, check vendor every level to shore up gear if needed. Goal is 30%+ fire/lightning resist, ^xB97123Steel Plate^7 chest, ^xB97123Temple Maul^7 with + dmg (40-60% ipd or 1 good flat dmg roll is plenty). ^xB97123Plate Belts^7 are wicked good. A ^xB97123Collosal Life Flask^7 with increased amount recovered is incredibly good. Do not throw this ^xC8C8C8^xB97123Temple Maul^7^7 away when you upgrade, you will need it handy at level 33 weapon upgrade if it's too good. A ^xB97123Shield^7^7^7 with increased block chance + resistance is ideal on a blue item.
^xADAA47Go back to finish ^x70FF70Trial of The Sekemas^7 ^xADAA47now if you haven't done so already.^7^7
^x70FF70Dreadnought Vanguard^7: Zoom through to ^xAF6025Jamanra^7 with shield setup.
^xD02090Act 3^7:
^x70FF70SandSwept Marshes^7: Kill the twin rares alongside Town Entrance wall across a bridge. Chest is lootable upon 1 of them being killed. ^xB97123Hanging Tree^7 drops a random ^x8888FFMagic Ring^7, but not the best bases (^x8888FFRuby/Topaz^7).
^x70FF701st Town^7: Check for ^xB97123Leaden Greathammers^7, this is the all in weapon. A good ^xB97123Leaden Greathammer^7 will be fine until t5+ maps. 200 phys top end is plenty, IAS will be ideal. Vendor fish every level.
^x70FF70Jungle Ruins^7: ^xB97123Jungle Grave^7 reward includes a ^xFFFF77Rare Rawhide Belt^7. ^xD02090^xAF6025Mighty SilverFist^7^7 guards the exit.
^x70FF70The Venom Crypts^7: Take the increased ^xB97123Stun Threshold^7.
^x70FF70Infested Barrens^7: Want to find WP (along the wall with water). Find ^x70FF70Azak Bog^7 and ^x70FF70Chimeral Wetlands^7, enter both to get WP and then travel back to ^x70FF70Azak Bog^7.
^x70FF70Azak Bog^7: At the CP in the middle of the zone with the effigies to burn, you can reset at mass here. You'll often get a blue & a rare pack. Farm up to level 37 at most here while fishing for items from vendor. The goal will be to end act 3 around level 39-40. Waterways & Goliath farming should be enough with minimal exping along the rest of the way.
^xAF6025Ignagduk's^7 arena is always in the NE of the zone.
A South East \ North West facing entrance means her arena points inwards. A North East / South West facing entrance means her arena points outwards.
Slot in ^x8888FFCannibalism^7 to ^x8888FFHerald of Ash^7 or whichever aura you're using, it is huge for sustain.
^x70FF70Chimeral Wetlands^7: Wall hug to ^x70FF70The Trial of Chaos^7/^xAF6025Chimera^7, CP back to WP CP to hug other way to the other. Be sure to grab ^x70FF70The Trial of Chaos^7 WP.
^x70FF70^7^xD02090Soul Core Mechanics^7: Soul cores are visible on explored parts of your map from quite a bit away. Their locations change each time you reset at checkpoint. All soul cores respawn upon reset, even if one of them has been "used". This is most useful in ^x70FF70Jiquani's Sanctum^7.
^x70FF70Jiquani's Machinarium^7^7: Explore down a side, reset at checkpoint to avoid back tracking and look in areas where we now soul cores aren't. It is possible for no soul cores to spawn in 1st area, hence the resetting. Need to pick up 2 soul cores after activating the 1st stone altar. 1 for exit and 1 to fight ^xAF6025Blackjaw^7. Open exit first to grab CP. Can reset for cores if needed. ^xAF6025Blackjaw^7 will be in the far end of the zone alongside the same wall as the exit.
^x70FF70Jiquani's Sanctu^7^x70FF70m^7: ^xB97123Paquate's Mechanism^7 is between the two generators if you have a corruption candidate. Optimal pathing is to rush 1 CP at a generator, portal out, doing /hideout (pre-type while portaling) take WP back to the sanctum. Doing so avoids the layouts where the middle doesn't connect up. Then you'll rush the other CP at the 2nd generator. In the case where you get a soul core on the way to 1st generator, you'll slot it in and reset at checkpoint to spawn both soul cores again, before portaling out. Explore the map around the checkpoint and then mass reset for the soul core to spawn visible on your map. After you put the 2nd one in, reset at checkpoint. This reset at checkpoint sends the generator energy all the way to Zicoatl, allowing you to skip the waiting period. Do the same portal out -> /hideout -> WP routine.
^x70FF70The Matlan Waterways^7: 13 levers, kill packs with 2hander leap slam + boneshatter, swap to shield setup when pulling levers. 1k+ armour builds can get away with not killing most packs and just tanking, but the exp is good and safer.
^x70FF70The Drowned City^7: Zone follows reliable generation rules, zoom through to Apex of Filth, make sure to grab WP.
^x70FF70Apex of Filth^7: Follow inside wall to ^xAF6025The Queen of Filth^7.
^x70FF70Temple of Kopec^7: 1st floor door can be in any corner. Can jump over certain broken sections of walls. 2nd floor cross full gap from center to wall to door. You can portal out the second Alva says, "Wait," to skip the animation of the platform rising up.
^x70FF70Uztaal^7: Follows predictable Dangerous zone, some cold res can feel good here to avoid eating random freezes. Atleast kill packs with Vaal Goliaths as you try to get ^xB97123Sacrificial Heart^7.
^x70FF70Aggorat^7: Predictable layout. Find WP near exit, than CP near ^xB97123Sacrificial Altar^7. Farm Goliaths as needed
^x70FF70The Black Chambers^7: Predictable layout, essentially symmetrical down the middle. Rush to Doryani and beware the lasers from the middle. Phase him quickly to avoid the lasers shooting out of the middle phase.
^xD02090Act 1 Cruel^7: Kill ^xAF6025Beira^7 onroute to ^x70FF70The Red Vale^7.
^xD02090Red Vale Farming^7: Obelisks spawn only blue monsters, it appears as the 1st obelisk spawns the most amount of blue monsters. The ideal way to farm is to kill nearly all the blue monsters, and then reset at checkpoint in mass for exp. This is a good opportunity to shore up resistances where needed by vendor fishing. You can farm up to level 47-48 here. Once you leave here, you can just finish the rest of campaign without stopping to farm again, just kill as you go and head straight to maps. Prioritize fire & lightning resistance and keep cold resistance shored up atleast. 30% all will be fine, but you'll want them fixed by maps.
^xADAA47Go back to finish ^x70FF70The Trial of Chaos^7 ^xADAA47if you haven't already.^7^7
^xADAA47You can also farm ^x70FF70Azak Bog^x70FF70 ^xADAA47in act 3 cruel and skip killing anything the entire way there so long you hit level 51-52.
